creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
Comment on attachment 180567
GitLab update to 8.13

Obsolete Patch since 8.13 is now in the tree. :)

I also set a patch for 8.14 to my testers. Hopefully there is positive feedback so it can went in next week. 

I'm not sure, if 8.14 already contain a bugfix fore the issue (since 8.13 should have it). If yes, this would be fine. If not we need the update to 8.15 which will have a bugfix.
